exact_obstruction: P_perp D(A0) is controlled and commutator control is proven, but P_perp D(A0+V) still needs a standalone graph-domain stability proof.
limitations: Projector graph-domain stability is not marked proven until the full P_perp D(A0+V) graph-domain argument is complete.
title: BHSM v2.5 Projector Graph-Domain Closure Attempt
